name: HR Job Posting and Evaluation with AI
description: Automated workflow: HR Job Posting and Evaluation with AI. This workflow integrates 16 different services: stickyNote, formTrigger, airtable, agent, googleDrive. It contains 46 nodes and follows best practices for error handling and security.
shortDescription: HR Job Posting and Evaluation with AI workflow containing 36 nodes.

originalWorkflowJson.name: HR Job Posting and Evaluation with AI

nodes.name: On form submission

parameters.formDescription:
=Fill this for to apply for the role Automation Specialist:

Location: Remote
Experience: Minimum 3 years
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description:
We are seeking a highly skilled Automation Specialist with at least 3 years of experience in designing and implementing workflow automation solutions. The ideal candidate will have expertise in tools such as n8n, Zapier, Make.com, or similar platforms, and a strong background in integrating APIs, streamlining processes, and enhancing operational efficiency.

Key Responsibilities:

 Develop and implement automated workflows to optimize business processes.
 Integrate third-party APIs and systems to create seamless data flow.
 Analyze, debug, and improve existing automation setups.
 Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify automation opportunities.
 Monitor and maintain automation systems to ensure reliability.

Required Skills & Qualifications:

 Proven 3+ years of experience in workflow automation and integration.
 Proficiency with tools like n8n, Zapier, or Make.com.
 Strong understanding of APIs, webhooks, and data transformation.
 Familiarity with scripting languages (e.g., JavaScript or Python).
 Excellent problem-solving and communication skills.

Preferred Qualifications:

 Experience with database management and cloud services.
 Background in business process analysis or RPA tools.

Why Join Us?

 Opportunity to work on cutting-edge automation projects.
 Supportive and collaborative team environment.
 Competitive salary and benefits package.

nodes.name: generate questionnaires

values.content:
=Given the following job description and candidate CV, create 5 insightful interview questions to gather more information about the candidate's suitability for the role. The questions should focus on:

 Specific projects the candidate has worked on.
 Key responsibilities and achievements in their previous roles.
 Skills relevant to the job description.
 Problem-solving abilities and how they handled challenges.
 Alignment with the company’s goals and values.

Provide the questions in a clear, concise format.

Job Description:
Use the airtable tool to get the job description

Candidate CV:
{{ $('Extract from File').item.json.text }}

nodes.name: Personalize email

values.content:
=Craft a personalized email to the interviewee, expressing interest in continuing the conversation over a phone call. The email should mention strengths or achievements from their CV or questionnaire responses, and include a polite request to have the phone conversation. Ensure the tone is professional and warm.

Provide an output of 
To:
Subject:
Email Content:

Inputs:

 The candidate's CV.
 The job description.
 The candidate's questionnaire responses stored in Airtable.


Example email:
Dear [Candidate's Name],

Thank you for submitting your application and responses to the questionnaire for the [Job Title] position. We were impressed by [specific strength or achievement from their CV or questionnaire, e.g., "your experience in automating workflows using n8n, which aligns closely with our goals"].

We’d love to continue the conversation to discuss your experience further. 

Looking forward to speaking with you soon.



NOTE: 
Sign off the email with

Regards,
Francis

nodes.name: Book Meeting

values.content:
=Check the interviewer's calendar for available 30-minute time slots within working hours (8 AM - 5 PM) the next day. Schedule the meeting and confirm the time with the candidate. Ensure that the meeting time is aligned with the candidate's and interviewer's availability.

Inputs:

 The interviewer's calendar for scheduling.
 Today's date: {{ $today }}

Use the calendar tool to book the meeting


Give back the follwoing information:
Start time:
End time:

nodes.name: Screening Questions

values.content:
=Given the job description, along with the candidate's CV and their responses to the questionnaires, generate a list of screening questions that will help gauge the candidate's suitability for the role. The questions should focus on understanding the candidate’s relevant experience, skills, and cultural fit. The questions should take into account both the job description and the candidate's background and responses. Provide a minimum of 5 questions.

Use the tools to get the job description and the applicant's responses to the questionnaires.

Applicant's CV:
{{ $('Extract from File').item.json.text }}


Give the output as various sentences as a paragraph with every new question in a new line:
Screening Questions:

## Download the CV and get the job description and requirements.
- ### Send the details to ChatGPT to score the viability of the candidate

## Update Airtable with score and reason for the score

- ### if score is above 0.7, shortlist and continue flow.

## Get questionnaires based on the JD and CV

- ### Update the responses in Airtable

## Personalize email and send

## Schedule Meeting and update meeting time in AIrtable
## Generate Screening Questions and post to Airtable

## Actions
- ### Change the `Form Description` with the job description you are hiring for.
- ### Make sure to check and change the prompts if need be to suit your use case.
- ### Use the Simple Applicant Tracker template on Airtable to set up the tables required.

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: airtable Token  A P I details
google Drive  O Auth2  A P I details
open Ai  A P I details
google Calendar  O Auth2  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "On form submission".
Open the "Airtable" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtable) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Upload CV to google drive" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "download CV" node (n8n-nodes-base.googleDrive) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Extract from File" node (n8n-nodes-base.extractFromFile) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "AI Agent" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "OpenAI Chat Model" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Airtable1" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtableTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Structured Output Parser" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.

Open the "generate questionnaires" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "questionnaires" node (n8n-nodes-base.form) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "update questionnaires" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtable) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "job_posting" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtableTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "candidate_insights" node (n8n-nodes-base.airtableTool) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Personalize email" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Send Email" node (n8n-nodes-base.emailSend) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.

Locate the Set/Edit fields node "applicant details".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Edit Fields".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Edit Fields1".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
